scripts.audit:lighthouse:mobile: set LIGHTHOUSE_CHROMIUM_PATH=C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe&& set CHROME_PATH=C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe&& lhci collect --config=.lighthouserc.mobile.json && lhci assert --config=.lighthouserc.mobile.json
scripts.audit:lighthouse:desktop: set LIGHTHOUSE_CHROMIUM_PATH=C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe&& set CHROME_PATH=C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe&& lhci collect --config=.lighthouserc.desktop.json && lhci assert --config=.lighthouserc.desktop.json
scripts.audit:axe: axe http://127.0.0.1:3000 http://127.0.0.1:3000/about http://127.0.0.1:3000/projects http://127.0.0.1:3000/certificates http://127.0.0.1:3000/contact --browser chrome --exit --load-delay 500
scripts.audit:a11y: pnpm build && start-server-and-test "pnpm start" http://127.0.0.1:3000 "pnpm audit:lighthouse:mobile && pnpm audit:lighthouse:desktop && pnpm audit:axe"
